note: Standalone structured pack of 9 NEW products (not updates). Merge via onboard / bulk-upsert / ETL.

symptoms.description: Loss of suction / brush roll stops
Error code E12 on display
Intermittent operation on RoboClean Stick Vacuum Pro

failure_modes.name: Brush Roll Motor Overload
failure_modes.description: Primary field failure for RoboClean Stick Vacuum Pro: Brush Roll Motor Overload.

failure_modes.name: Control Board Communication Fault
failure_modes.description: Secondary board/comms fault that can mimic primary symptoms.

diagnostic_steps.description: Confirm error E12 and recreate symptom: Loss of suction / brush roll stops.
Inspect Agitator Drive and measure related part Brush Roll Motor Assembly.
Run self-test / forced cycle and capture sensor readings.

historical_resolutions.description: Replaced Brush Roll Motor Assembly after E12 / Loss of suction / brush roll stops
historical_resolutions.technician_notes: Test pack resolution for vac-001. Part vac-001-p01
